zh.Witton-le-Wear, Durham, Durham, England,: 英國英格蘭達勒姆維頓勒-維亞爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Katherine Aton於大約1340年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton43歲，母親Isabel Percy15歲。她和Sir Ralph Eure至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1422年在她的家鄉享年83歲。

zh-hans.Witton-le-Wear, Durham, Durham, England,: 英国英格兰達勒姆維頓勒-維亞爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Katherine Aton于大约1340年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton43岁，母亲Isabel Percy15岁。她和Sir Ralph Eure至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1422年在她的家乡享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Aton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Hatton , with loss of initial H-.
topographic name from Middle English atte toun ‘(dweller) at the settlement’ (Old English æt thǣm tūn(e)).

variants.name: Hatton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Hatton (Cheshire, Derbyshire, Lincolnshire, Middlesex, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Warwickshire), Hatton Hall (Cheshire), or Cold and High Hatton (Shropshire). The placenames derive from Old English hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Heath .
English: variant of Atton with prosthetic H-, a topographic name from Middle English atte toun ‘(dweller) at the settlement’ (Old English æt thǣm tūn(e)). Compare Towne .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Chatáin, a patronymic from a personal name meaning ‘servant of (Saint) Catan’; see McHatton .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of Katherine , derived from the pet form Kit + the hypocoristic suffix -y. It is also used as an independent given name.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Katherine Aton was born about 1340, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton, was 43 and her mother, Isabel Percy, was 15. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Sir Ralph Eure. She died in 1422, in her hometown, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Katherine Aton est née environ 1340, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Isabel Percy, avait 15 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Sir Ralph Eure. Elle est décédée en 1422, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Katherine Aton um 1340 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton 43 und ihre Mutter Isabel Percy 15. Sie hatte mit Sir Ralph Eure mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1422 im Alter von 83 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Katherine Aton è nata il circa 1340 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Isabel Percy, aveva 15 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Sir Ralph Eure. Morì nel 1422, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Witton-le-Wear, Durham, Durham, England,: イギリスイギリスダルハムウィットオン-レ-ウエアル
ja.Aton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Atonが約1340年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Atonは43歳，母Isabel Percyは15歳であった。彼女はSir Ralph Eureとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1422年に故郷で83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Aton(이)가 대략 1340년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Percy(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 Sir Ralph Eure(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1422년 그녀의 고향에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Witton-le-Wear, Durham, Durham, England,: Witton-le-Wear, Durham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Katherine Aton nasceu aproximadamente 1340, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Percy, tinha 15 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Sir Ralph Eure. Ela faleceu em 1422, em sua cidade natal, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Katherine Aton родилась около 1340 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Percy, 15. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Sir Ralph Eure. Она умерла в 1422 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Katherine Aton nació aproximadamente 1340, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Isabel Percy, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Sir Ralph Eure. Murió en 1422, en su pueblo, a la edad de 83 años.
